rationale: Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-2265; proactive spec-rollout for server 6.0 allowDiskUse default, driver not wrong.
Child of DRIVERS-1713; explicitly converting change stream spec tests to Unified Test Format.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-2314; bump maxWireVersion for MongoDB 6.0, routine version update.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1940; adding new $densify aggregation stage, new feature not a bug.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1707; new SDAM requirement to cancel operations on heartbeat timeout, not a prior bug.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1853; adding clustered index support, new feature rollout.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-2326; FLE 2 collection management update, spec-rollout not a bug.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-2285; adding wallTime to change stream events, new spec requirement.
C# LINQ/filter builder bug allowing mixed string/regex in $in; C#-specific ORM type-mapping issue, not spec.
C# fluent aggregate LINQ translation of Max() lambda is incorrect; driver-specific LINQ bug, no spec rule violated.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-2309; banning encrypted-field comparisons in validators, new CSFLE requirement.
Upgrade libmongocrypt to 1.5.0 and add new binding functions; internal dependency update, no spec rule violated.
Driver changes to integrate CSFLE shared library path options; internal implementation detail, no spec rule cited.
LINQ filter does not support BsonValue.AsString; C#-specific expression tree translation issue, not a MongoDB spec.
Adding [Beta] API annotation to Queryable Encryption public API; API labeling task, no behavior change.
Quick Tour documentation has inconsistent query example with counter field; documentation bug, no spec involved.
First call to serverless Atlas fails with pool paused exception; implementation/timing issue, no specific CMAP rule cited.
Any/AnyAsync lack IFindFluent projection+limit extensions; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule involved.
Driver crashes in Azure Functions .NET 3.1 due to DnsClientWrapper init failure; environment compatibility bug.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-2018; adding AWS Lambda code examples to documentation.
CryptClient pins GC buffer but never unpins it; resource leak in CSFLE internals, not a spec behavioral rule.
MSBuild publish fails for .NET 4.8 projects after driver upgrade 2.12→2.16; packaging/build compatibility issue.
LINQ aggregate projection ignores custom BsonRepresentation serializer on enums; C#-specific serialization/ORM bug.
Driver sends getLastError to mongocryptd which doesn't support it; CSFLE implementation oversight, no spec rule violated.
Custom IEnumerable<T> serialized assuming List<T>; C# BSON serialization type-mapping bug, no BSON wire spec violated.
Adding $topN and similar new accumulators in $group; new aggregation feature support, not a spec violation.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1974; adding $sortArray aggregation expression, new feature rollout.
Adding AppendStage extension to IMongoQueryable; API ergonomics improvement, no spec behavior involved.
[BsonRepresentation] attribute ignored in LINQ projection; C#-specific ORM/serialization attribute bug, not MongoDB spec.
LINQ $all clause rendering drops the array field name in query; C#-specific LINQ translation bug, no spec rule violated.
LINQ projection sometimes uses wrong element name; C#-specific LINQ translation bug with BsonElement attributes.
LinqV3 null-coalescing with empty string throws serializer error; C#-specific LINQ V3 expression translation bug.
Converting internal C# unit tests for $dateXyz to integration tests; internal test quality improvement, not spec YAML tests.
Projection to same type including _id causes deserialization failure in LINQ; C#-specific LINQ/ORM bug, no spec rule.
$bitsAnySet and bitwise LINQ expressions throw exception; C#-specific LINQ translation bug, no spec rule violated.
Aggregate().Project() ignores [BsonElement] attribute in strongly typed class; C#-specific ORM serialization bug.
Dispose CancellationTokenSource in test code; test resource cleanup, no driver behavior or spec involved.
ConnectionPool_cleared_on_failed_hello spec test has race condition in failpoint setup; fixing CMAP test reliability.
Improvement + Issue split from MONGOCRYPT-441; accepting string values for QueryType/IndexType, new CSFLE feature.
Child of DRIVERS-2360; fixing CSE Prose Test 13 expectation to account for no matching documents.
Bug + Issue split from DRIVERS-2359; fixing runOnRequirement to require 4.2.0 server for csfle:true tests.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-2367; making RewrapManyDataKeyResult.bulkWriteResult optional per spec update.
Child of DRIVERS-2356; reducing expected removeKeyAltName operations to single findOneAndUpdate in CSE spec tests.
Child of DRIVERS-2373; removing unnecessary on-demand credentials from CSE unified spec test files.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-2023; adding troubleshooting FAQ section, documentation task.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1975; improved change stream event visibility for C2C replication, new feature.

gh-pages documentation print layout has unnecessary header elements; documentation/CSS issue, no spec involved.
Child of DRIVERS-2382; updating expectResult: null in CSE unified spec test files.
